hero.headline: Your Dream Pool, Built Right
hero.subheadline: Jacksonville's family-owned pool contractor delivering luxury outdoor living with transparent pricing and hands-on craftsmanship. Licensed, insured, and committed to exceeding your expectations.
checkmarks: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees
Photo updates after every service visit

services.headline: Pool Services Built Around Your Lifestyle
services.subtitle: From new construction to weekly maintenance, we handle every detail so you can enjoy your backyard oasis worry-free.

items.title: New Pool Construction
items.description: Signature and custom pool builds designed to fit your budget, lifestyle, and property — from pre-designed options to fully custom luxury pools.

items.title: Pool Remodeling & Renovations
items.description: Transform your existing pool with updated finishes, expanded features, modern tile, and resurfacing to breathe new life into your backyard.

items.title: Equipment Upgrades
items.description: Full equipment replacements including pumps, heaters, automation systems, LED lighting, filters, and salt chlorine generators.

items.title: Spa Additions
items.description: Add a custom spa or hot tub to your existing pool setup for the ultimate relaxation experience right in your backyard.

items.title: Water Features
items.description: Enhance your pool with elegant waterfalls, fountains, bubblers, and deck jets that elevate your outdoor living space.

items.title: Pool Maintenance
items.description: Regular maintenance to keep your pool sparkling clean, chemically balanced, and operating at peak performance year-round.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Perfect Pool

steps.title: Free Consultation
steps.description: We visit your property, discuss your vision and budget, and provide a transparent quote with no hidden fees or surprises.

steps.title: Design & Build
steps.description: Our team brings your vision to life with hands-on owner involvement, regular photo updates, and clear communication at every stage.

steps.title: Enjoy & Relax
steps.description: Dive into your new luxury outdoor space knowing it was built right the first time, backed by our quality guarantee.

about.label: Family-Owned in Jacksonville
about.headline: Built on Honesty, Communication & Craftsmanship
about.description: Scott's Pools & Spas was founded in 2022 on a simple principle: treat every customer's pool like it's our own. As a family-owned company, owner Scott Campbell is personally involved in every project — ensuring clear communication, realistic expectations, and dependable results. We don't cut corners, and we never leave you guessing. With detailed photo reports after every service and transparent pricing from day one, we've earned the trust of 63 five-star clients across Northeast Florida.

features.title: Owner-Involved
features.description: Scott Campbell is personally involved in every project, ensuring quality craftsmanship and clear communication from start to finish.

features.title: Photo Reports Every Visit
features.description: Receive detailed photo documentation after every service visit so you always know exactly what was done and why.

features.title: Transparent Pricing Always
features.description: No hidden fees, no surprise charges. Every quote is detailed upfront so you know exactly what you are paying for.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, Zero Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every quote is detailed and upfront. No hidden fees, no change-order games, no bait-and-switch. Just honest pricing for premium pool work.

guarantee.headline: Our Built-Right Guarantee
guarantee.description: We stand behind every project we complete. If something isn't right, we'll make it right — no excuses, no runaround. Your satisfaction and your pool's performance are our top priorities, backed by our Florida contractor's license and full insurance coverage.

faqs.question: How long does a new pool construction take?
faqs.answer: Most new pool builds take 8-12 weeks depending on the design complexity, permitting timelines, and weather conditions. We keep you updated with photos and progress reports throughout the entire process.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes! We are a fully licensed Florida pool contractor (License #CPC1460880) and carry comprehensive insurance. You can verify our license on the Florida DBPR website.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for pool construction?
faqs.answer: We work with several financing partners to help make your dream pool a reality. During your free consultation, we'll discuss budget-friendly options that fit your financial situation.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Jacksonville, Jacksonville Beach, Ponte Vedra Beach, Neptune Beach, Atlantic Beach, St. Augustine, and surrounding Northeast Florida communities.

faqs.question: How do I get a quote for my project?
faqs.answer: Simply call us at 904-364-0028 or fill out our contact form. We'll schedule a free on-site consultation to discuss your vision, assess your property, and provide a detailed, transparent quote.

testimonials.name: Marie Mortenson
testimonials.text: They exceeded my expectations on every level. Excellent communication with photos and prompt problem-solving.

testimonials.name: Molly Katsma
testimonials.text: Scott came out within 30 minutes of us calling! His honesty and quality work are why we will always call him for future service.

testimonials.name: Fred Dean
testimonials.text: Scott has been amazing! He fixed and optimized pool equipment that a previous company had neglected to address.

benefits: No pressure, no hidden fees — ever
